meta.title: Weverton Rodrigues | Senior Product Engineer
meta.description: Weverton Rodrigues — Senior Product Engineer in Goiânia, Brazil. Portfolio and projects in React, TypeScript, AWS, and AI. Open to senior engineering opportunities.
meta.keywords: Weverton Rodrigues, senior product engineer, full-stack engineer, AI products, RAG, semantic search, MCP, React, TypeScript, Next.js, NestJS, GraphQL, AWS, Kubernetes, healthcare software, enterprise SaaS, React Native, distributed systems, Goiânia, Brazil, portfolio, opportunities

home.tagline: I turn complex product ideas into scalable software.
home.description: Senior Product Engineer building AI-native applications, distributed systems, and modern web platforms—from architecture to production.
home.impact: Known for turning ambiguous ideas into reliable products, improving engineering workflows, and raising the technical bar across teams.

work.title: Work
work.intro: Products I've built across AI-native marketing, healthcare, enterprise SaaS, and distributed systems—from semantic search and RAG pipelines to offline-first mobile apps and event-driven microservices.

items.title: AI Product Platform
items.description: Built AI-native marketing workflows combining semantic search, knowledge bases, RAG, and intelligent agents (MCP, Playbooks) to accelerate content operations. Shipped production-grade retrieval pipelines and observability on AWS at global scale.
items.highlight: Engineering decisions that improved content velocity, retrieval accuracy, and operational scale across a distributed marketing stack.

items.title: Healthcare Platforms
items.description: Designed secure healthcare and telemedicine applications with enterprise SSO, research tooling, and AI-assisted development—accelerating clinical and research workflows without compromising reliability or compliance.
items.highlight: Faster iteration on research and clinical tools while maintaining security, authentication, and enterprise compliance standards.

items.title: Enterprise Support Systems
items.description: Designed enterprise support platforms with visual chatbot flow editors, real-time helpdesk ticketing, WebSocket collaboration, and offline-first mobile experiences used daily by support and field operations teams.
items.highlight: Platforms adopted for high-volume ticketing, conversational workflow design, and field operations with secure offline sync.

items.title: Distributed Systems Platform
items.description: Led full-stack delivery of scalable SaaS with a GraphQL BFF, NestJS microservices, RabbitMQ messaging, and Temporal saga workflows—containerized on Kubernetes with hexagonal architecture and comprehensive test coverage.
items.highlight: Improved idempotency, async reliability, and team velocity through event-driven design and pragmatic architecture decisions.

about.title: About
bio: I enjoy solving difficult engineering problems where architecture, product thinking, and user experience meet. My work ranges from AI-native applications to distributed backend systems, always with a strong focus on simplicity, scalability, and long-term maintainability.

Over the last eight years, I've helped companies build products from the ground up, modernize legacy platforms, and deliver complex systems used by thousands of users across healthcare, AI, and enterprise software.
philosophy: Leave every codebase better than you found it

contact.intro: Whether you're building a new product, scaling an existing platform, or exploring AI-powered solutions, I'd love to hear about it.

availability.text: Available for senior engineering roles, product consulting, and ambitious software projects.
